homepage.heroSubline: Expert craftsmanship, enduring quality. Transforming Jacksonville homes with precision and care.
aboutText: Professional General Works started with a simple goal: to provide unmatched remodeling services to Jacksonville homeowners. We saw a need for reliable, detail-oriented contractors who understand the unique challenges of Florida homes, from humidity to hurricane preparedness.

Our approach is built on clear communication, meticulous planning, and unwavering commitment to quality. We value integrity, transparency, and collaboration, ensuring every project reflects your vision and our expertise.

We're proud to be part of the Jacksonville community. We source materials locally whenever possible, support local businesses, and strive to contribute to the beauty and resilience of our neighborhoods.

valueProps.title: Local Expertise
valueProps.description: Deep understanding of Jacksonville's climate, architecture, and building codes.

valueProps.title: Detailed Planning
valueProps.description: Meticulous project management from initial consultation to final walkthrough.

valueProps.title: Quality Craftsmanship
valueProps.description: Skilled tradespeople delivering superior workmanship and lasting results.

valueProps.title: Transparent Communication
valueProps.description: Open and honest updates throughout the entire remodeling process.

homepage.ctaSubline: Get a free consultation and discover the possibilities for your Jacksonville home.

services.name: Kitchen Remodeling
services.shortDescription: Transform your kitchen into the heart of your Jacksonville home.
services.description: Jacksonville kitchens face unique challenges, from humidity warping cabinets to outdated layouts hindering modern living. We specialize in kitchen remodels that address these concerns while creating a functional and beautiful space. We handle everything from cabinet replacement and countertop installation to appliance upgrades and custom storage solutions. Our team will work with you to design a kitchen that reflects your style and meets your needs, whether you're dreaming of a sleek, modern space or a cozy, traditional gathering place. We use moisture-resistant materials and proven techniques to ensure your kitchen withstands the Florida climate for years to come. Let us create a kitchen you'll love to cook in and share with your family for years to come. We navigate Jacksonville's permitting process to create a seamless remodel.
process: Step 1: Initial Consultation and Design Planning
Step 2: Material Selection and Budget Review
Step 4: Finishing Touches and Final Inspection

faq.question: How long does a typical kitchen remodel take?
faq.answer: The timeline varies depending on the scope of the project, but most kitchen remodels take between 6-12 weeks.

faq.question: Do I need to move out during the remodel?
faq.answer: While it's not always necessary, many homeowners find it more comfortable to relocate during the demolition and construction phases.

faq.question: What kind of warranty do you offer on your work?
faq.answer: We offer a comprehensive warranty on all our labor and materials, ensuring your peace of mind.

services.name: Bathroom Remodeling
services.shortDescription: Create a spa-like retreat in your Jacksonville home with our expert bathroom remodeling services.
services.description: Jacksonville bathrooms often suffer from mold, mildew, and water damage due to the humid climate. We provide comprehensive bathroom remodeling services that address these issues while creating a relaxing and functional space. We handle everything from tub-to-shower conversions and vanity installations to tile work and plumbing upgrades. Our team uses waterproof materials and proper ventilation techniques to prevent moisture problems and ensure your bathroom lasts for years to come. Whether you're looking for a luxurious master bath or a practical guest bath, we'll work with you to create a space that meets your needs and reflects your style. We understand the unique challenges of remodeling older Jacksonville homes and ensure all work meets current building codes.
process: Step 1: Design Consultation and Space Planning

faq.question: Can you help me choose the right fixtures for my bathroom?
faq.answer: Absolutely! We have extensive experience with different fixtures and can guide you towards options that fit your style, budget, and needs.

faq.question: Do you handle plumbing and electrical work?
faq.answer: Yes, we have licensed plumbers and electricians on our team to ensure all work is done safely and to code.

faq.question: How do you prevent mold and mildew in bathrooms?
faq.answer: We use moisture-resistant materials, proper ventilation techniques, and sealant applications to prevent mold and mildew growth.

services.name: Whole House Remodeling
services.shortDescription: Transform your entire Jacksonville home with our comprehensive remodeling services.
services.description: Is your Jacksonville home stuck in the past? Do you dream of a more modern, functional, and beautiful living space? Our whole-house remodeling services can bring your vision to life. We handle everything from structural changes and room additions to interior design and exterior renovations. Our team will work with you to create a cohesive design plan that reflects your style and meets your needs. We prioritize efficient project management, clear communication, and quality craftsmanship to ensure a seamless and stress-free remodeling experience. We are familiar with the architectural styles prevalent in Jacksonville neighborhoods like Riverside and Avondale, ensuring any changes are sympathetic to the existing character of your home.
process: Step 1: Comprehensive Consultation and Design Development
Step 4: Full-Scale Remodeling and Project Management

faq.question: How long does a whole-house remodel typically take?
faq.answer: The timeline depends on the size and complexity of the project, but most whole-house remodels take between 6-18 months.

faq.question: What is the first step in the remodeling process?
faq.answer: The first step is a comprehensive consultation to discuss your goals, budget, and design preferences.

faq.question: How do you manage the disruption to my daily life during the remodel?
faq.answer: We prioritize minimizing disruption by carefully planning each phase of the project and maintaining a clean and organized work site.

services.name: Room Additions
services.shortDescription: Expand your living space with our expert room addition services in Jacksonville.
services.description: Need more space in your Jacksonville home? Whether you're adding a new bedroom, expanding your kitchen, or creating a home office, we can help. Our room addition services are tailored to meet your specific needs and budget. We handle everything from design and permitting to construction and finishing. We understand the unique challenges of building additions in Jacksonville, including soil conditions, zoning regulations, and hurricane preparedness. Our team will ensure your addition seamlessly integrates with your existing home and meets all applicable building codes. We have experience working with a variety of Jacksonville home styles, from historic bungalows to modern ranch homes.
process: Step 1: Site Assessment and Design Planning

faq.question: Do I need a permit for a room addition?
faq.answer: Yes, a building permit is required for all room additions in Jacksonville. We will handle the permitting process for you.

faq.question: How long does it take to build a room addition?
faq.answer: The timeline depends on the size and complexity of the addition, but most room additions take between 3-6 months.

faq.question: How do you ensure the addition matches my existing home?
faq.answer: We carefully match the exterior materials, roofing, and architectural details to ensure a seamless integration.

services.name: Deck & Patio Construction
services.shortDescription: Extend your living space outdoors with a custom deck or patio.
services.description: Enjoy the Jacksonville sunshine with a custom-designed deck or patio. We specialize in building durable and beautiful outdoor living spaces that withstand the Florida climate. We offer a variety of materials, including pressure-treated wood, composite decking, and pavers. Our team will work with you to design a deck or patio that meets your needs and complements your home's architecture. We take into account factors like sun exposure, drainage, and privacy when designing your outdoor space. We understand the importance of proper construction techniques to prevent rot, insect damage, and water damage. We obtain all necessary permits and ensure compliance with local building codes.
process: Step 1: Design Consultation and Site Assessment

faq.question: What type of decking material is best for Jacksonville's climate?
faq.answer: Composite decking is a great option for Jacksonville because it's resistant to rot, insects, and fading. Pressure-treated wood is also a good choice, but it requires more maintenance.

faq.question: Do I need a permit for a deck or patio?
faq.answer: Yes, a building permit is typically required for decks and patios that are elevated or attached to the house. We will handle the permitting process for you.

faq.question: How long does it take to build a deck or patio?
faq.answer: The timeline depends on the size and complexity of the project, but most decks and patios take between 2-4 weeks.

services.name: Flooring Installation
services.shortDescription: Upgrade your Jacksonville home with new, beautiful flooring.
services.description: From hardwood to tile, we offer professional flooring installation services to enhance the look and feel of your Jacksonville home. We understand the importance of choosing the right flooring material for each room in your home, taking into account factors like moisture, traffic, and style. We provide expert installation services for a variety of flooring types, including hardwood, laminate, tile, vinyl, and carpet. Our team pays close attention to detail to ensure a flawless and long-lasting installation. We prepare the subfloor properly to prevent problems like squeaking and unevenness. We are experienced in installing flooring in Jacksonville's diverse range of homes, from historic homes with unique subfloor challenges to new construction.
process: Step 2: Site Preparation and Subfloor Evaluation

faq.question: What type of flooring is best for high-moisture areas like bathrooms and kitchens?
faq.answer: Tile and vinyl are excellent choices for high-moisture areas because they are waterproof and easy to clean.

faq.question: How long does it take to install new flooring?
faq.answer: The timeline depends on the size of the area and the type of flooring being installed, but most flooring installations take between 1-5 days.

faq.question: Do you remove the old flooring?
faq.answer: Yes, we will remove and dispose of your old flooring as part of our installation service.

services.name: Painting Services
services.shortDescription: Refresh and revitalize your Jacksonville home with our professional painting services.
services.description: A fresh coat of paint can transform the look and feel of your Jacksonville home. We offer professional interior and exterior painting services that enhance your home's beauty and protect it from the elements. We use high-quality paints and proven techniques to ensure a long-lasting and beautiful finish. Our team prepares the surfaces properly by cleaning, sanding, and priming to ensure optimal adhesion. We pay close attention to detail to achieve crisp lines and a smooth, even finish. We understand the challenges of painting in Jacksonville's humid climate and use paints that are resistant to mold, mildew, and fading. We can help you choose the perfect colors to complement your home's style and your personal taste.

faq.question: How long does it take to paint a room?
faq.answer: The timeline depends on the size of the room and the complexity of the project, but most rooms can be painted in 1-2 days.

faq.question: Do you offer color consultations?
faq.answer: Yes, we can help you choose the perfect colors for your home.

faq.question: What type of paint do you use?
faq.answer: We use high-quality paints from trusted brands that are designed to withstand Jacksonville's climate.

serviceAreas.content:
Professional General Works is proud to offer comprehensive home remodeling services to the historic city of St. Augustine, Florida. We understand the unique architectural character of this area, with its beautiful Spanish Colonial influences and historic landmarks. Whether you're looking to update your kitchen, renovate a bathroom, or add a new addition while preserving the historical integrity of your home, our team has the expertise to handle any project. We have experience navigating the specific permitting and design requirements often found in historic districts. 

We are also well-versed in addressing the challenges presented by the hot, humid climate of St. Augustine. From selecting durable, weather-resistant materials to ensuring proper ventilation and insulation, we'll help you create a comfortable and energy-efficient living space that can withstand the elements. We're committed to providing exceptional craftsmanship and personalized service to homeowners throughout St. Augustine.
serviceAreas.localContext: St. Augustine, known as the nation's oldest city, boasts stunning Spanish Colonial architecture and a rich history.

serviceAreas.content:
Professional General Works provides expert home remodeling services to the residents of Orange Park, Florida. Known for its established neighborhoods featuring many 1970s and 80s suburban ranch-style homes, Orange Park offers a unique blend of community and convenience. We specialize in updating and modernizing these classic homes, transforming them into contemporary living spaces that meet the needs of today's families. From kitchen and bathroom remodels to whole-house renovations, we can help you create the home of your dreams.

We understand the specific challenges and opportunities presented by the architecture and climate of Orange Park. We can help you select the right materials and design elements to enhance your home's curb appeal and functionality while addressing the demands of the hot, humid Florida summers. Our team is dedicated to providing exceptional service and craftsmanship to every client in Orange Park.
serviceAreas.localContext: Orange Park features many suburban ranch homes built in the 1970s and 80s, offering a variety of remodeling opportunities.

serviceAreas.content:
Professional General Works is proud to serve the vibrant city of Jacksonville, Florida, offering a comprehensive range of home remodeling services. As the largest city in Florida by land area, Jacksonville presents a diverse array of architectural styles and neighborhood characteristics. From historic homes in Riverside and Avondale to modern residences in the Beaches area, we have the expertise to handle any remodeling project, big or small. We're committed to providing exceptional craftsmanship and personalized service to homeowners throughout Jacksonville.

We understand the unique challenges and opportunities presented by the Jacksonville climate, including hot, humid summers and occasional hurricanes. Our team can help you select durable, weather-resistant materials and design features that will protect your home and enhance its energy efficiency. Whether you're looking to update your kitchen, renovate a bathroom, or add a new addition, we're here to help you create the home of your dreams.
serviceAreas.localContext: Jacksonville is a large, diverse city with a wide range of architectural styles and neighborhoods.

reviews.name: Sarah M.
reviews.text: Professional General Works completely transformed my outdated kitchen! They listened to my ideas, offered helpful suggestions, and delivered a stunning result. The new cabinets and countertops are exactly what I wanted. The team was professional, respectful, and always on time. Highly recommend!

reviews.name: John B.
reviews.text: We hired Professional General Works to remodel our master bathroom. The initial design process was smooth, and the team was very responsive to our needs. There were a couple of minor delays due to material availability, but they communicated clearly and kept us informed. The finished bathroom looks fantastic!

reviews.name: Emily K.
reviews.text: Undertaking a whole-house remodel seemed daunting, but Professional General Works made the process manageable and stress-free. They helped us create a beautiful and functional living space that perfectly suits our family's needs. Their attention to detail and commitment to quality are truly impressive.

reviews.name: David L.
reviews.text: Professional General Works built an amazing deck for our backyard. It's the perfect place to relax and entertain. They used high-quality materials, and the workmanship is excellent. We're so happy with the result!

reviews.name: Jessica P.
reviews.text: We recently had new hardwood floors installed throughout our home by Professional General Works. The installation process was quick and efficient, and the floors look beautiful. There were a few minor scratches on the baseboards, but they were promptly repaired. Overall, we're very satisfied with the service.

reviews.name: Robert S.
reviews.text: Professional General Works did an excellent job painting the exterior of our house. They were meticulous in their preparation and applied the paint evenly and professionally. The house looks brand new! I'd highly recommend them.
